name: 聖旨冊封（登頂時刻）
description: 正式的冊封儀式，宣讀聖旨封皇后和太子，配合「瑞光普照」的祥瑞異象，是視覺和情感的雙重高潮。
tags: 從冷宮廢后到中宮皇后的極端反轉在正式儀式中呈現

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: She is hereby appointed as the empress of the central palace and granted residence at the skyworm keep... A brilliant aura covers the land. This is a very auspicious sign.
examples.context: 從冷宮廢后到中宮皇后的極端反轉在正式儀式中呈現
